# ParamHeaders.IsParamHeader method

Returns `true` when *name* is an `Mcp-Param-*` header (case-insensitive).

```csharp
public static bool IsParamHeader(string name)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| name | The header name. |

## Return Value

`true` when it begins with `Mcp-Param-`.
